name: EULAV Asset Management
description: EULAV Asset Management serves as the investment adviser to the Value Line Funds and Value Line Portfolios. The firm offers a diversified family of mutual funds covering a wide range of investment objectives, including equity, fixed income, and hybrid funds, alongside quantitatively driven Separately Managed Accounts (SMAs). Designed for long-term investors, these actively managed strategies are available through brokerage firms, financial advisers, or directly to individuals. Based in New York, the company focuses on providing investment solutions that help clients meet their long-term financial goals through a time-tested investment process.
